MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-11-2020 IN 206 -- APPEARANCE VIA COURTCALL BY GEORGE KAWAMOTO, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF RUBY CHIN WOO; ANGELE CICALA, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT ASJK LLC -- PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A). THE TRIAL DATE IS 11/30/20 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 WITH A LAST DAY OF 12/9/20. LAST DAY FOR HEARING SUMMARY JUDGMENT/ADJUDICATION MOTIONS IS 11/26/20. SUMMARY JUDGMENT/ADJUDICATION MOTIONS SHALL BE BROUGHT ON REGUALR NOTICE PURSUANT TO THE RELEVANT PROVISION OF THE CCP UNLESS THE PARTIES STIPULATE OTHERWISE. TIME TO REPSOND TO DISCOVERY NOT SERVED IS SHORTENED TO 20 DAYS. RESPONSES TO WRITTEN DISCOVERY ALREADY SERVED ARED DUE 20 DAYS OF THIS HEARING OR BY THE DATED DETERMINED BY THE CCP, WHICHEVER IS EARLIER. FACT DISCOVERY CUT-OFF DATE IS 11/20/20. EXPERT DISCOVERY CUT-OFF DATE IS 11/27/20. ELECTRONIC SERVICE IS EQUIVALENT TO PERSONAL SERVICE. IF THERE IS ANY KIND OF ISSUE/DISPUTE THAT REQUIRES MEET AND CONFER, SUCH MEET AND CONFER SHALL NOT BE MADE VIA E-MAIL OR LETTER. IT SHALL OCCUR IN PERSON OR VIA TELEPHONE. ORDER SIGNED. COUNSEL FOR MOVING PARTY TO SERVE FILED ORDER. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
